copypastas.text: LIZARD Hi fl0m- It’s me, your only Viewer. For Months I have created the illusion that you are streaming to a large audience. But here’s the truth: all these people in the chat are me. And now, for you to be convinced of this, I will send this message from all my accounts. LIZARD
At no point will Fl0m whisper you about food giveaways giveaways. This is a known scam. Report the account for scamming. Us banning them does nothing. Contact a mod for any questions.
